Bash("C:/Program Files/R/R-4.4.2/bin/Rscript.exe" --vanilla -e "library\(cleanTMLE\)" -e "dat <- sim_func1\(n=500, seed=42\)" -e "spec <- specify_models\(data=dat\) |> identify_outcome\(event, type=''time_to_event''\) |> identify_treatment\(treatment, formula=~age+sex+biomarker\) |> identify_censoring\(censored, formula=~age+sex, model=''coxph''\) |> identify_subject\(id\)" -e "fit_ipw <- estimate_ipwrisk\(spec, risk_time=c\(12,24\), weight_type=''iptw'', nboot=20, seed=42\)" -e "spec_gc <- specify_models\(data=dat\) |> identify_outcome\(event, formula=~treatment+age+sex+biomarker, type=''time_to_event''\) |> identify_treatment\(treatment\)" -e "fit_gc <- estimate_gcomprisk\(spec_gc, risk_time=c\(12,24\)\)" -e "spec_aipw <- specify_models\(data=dat\) |> identify_outcome\(event, formula=~treatment+age+sex+biomarker, type=''time_to_event''\) |> identify_treatment\(treatment, formula=~age+sex+biomarker\) |> identify_censoring\(censored, formula=~age+sex, model=''coxph''\)" -e "fit_aipw <- estimate_aipwrisk\(spec_aipw, risk_time=c\(12,24\)\)" -e "comp <- compare_fits\(IPW=fit_ipw, GComp=fit_gc, AIPW=fit_aipw, risk_time=24\)" -e "print\(comp\)")
